name: wxcode-admin-voyage-travel
title: Voyage Admin
description: Airy light-mode admin aesthetic: white-and-pale-blue canvas (#f6fafc), sky-blue accent (#0ea5e9), coral secondary accent (#fb7185), grouped sidebar navigation with entity-switcher pill, 60px topbar with centered search and date-range chip, 4 KPI cards with sparklines and delta badges, a two-column content grid (entity board + breakdown chart), a dense records table, and a donut side panel. Archetype = sidebar nav + 4 KPI cards + two-column board/chart grid + records table + donut panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this airy light-mode admin aesthetic to my domain — white-and-sky canvas, coral accent, sidebar navigation with entity switcher, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a two-column board and breakdown chart, a dense records table with status pills, and a donut side panel, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个通透亮色管理后台风格应用到我的领域：白色/天蓝底色、珊瑚色辅助色、带实体切换器的侧边导航、4 个 KPI 卡片（含迷你折线图）、双列面板（主看板 + 分类图表）、带状态标签的密集记录表格，以及甜甜圈侧栏，配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
